regulation_reference: SEBI ICDR Regulations 2018, Chapter IX, Schedule VI, Part A, Clause 14
description: Disclosure of all material related party transactions entered into by the company with related parties, as defined under the Companies Act 2013 and applicable Accounting Standards (AS-18 / Ind AS 24).

related_party_name.label: Related Party Name
related_party_name.icdr_text: Name of the related party with whom the transaction has been entered into.
related_party_name.help_text: Full legal name of the related party.

relationship_type.label: Relationship Type
relationship_type.icdr_text: Nature of relationship as defined under Section 2(76) of the Companies Act, 2013.
relationship_type.help_text: Select the nature of relationship with the related party.

transaction_type.label: Transaction Type
transaction_type.icdr_text: Nature of the transaction entered into.
transaction_type.help_text: Describe the nature of the transaction (e.g., sale of goods, purchase of services, loan given/taken, rent paid/received).

amount.label: Transaction Amount (₹ in Lakhs)
amount.icdr_text: Amount of the transaction in the relevant financial year.
amount.help_text: Total transaction amount in the financial year.

financial_year.label: Financial Year
financial_year.icdr_text: Details for each of the three preceding financial years and the stub period.

is_arms_length.label: At Arm's Length?
is_arms_length.icdr_text: Whether the transaction was conducted at arm's length and in the ordinary course of business.
is_arms_length.help_text: Indicate whether this transaction was conducted at arm's length pricing.

notes: Related party transactions must be disclosed for the last 3 financial years and the stub period.
Arm's length assessment should be supported by independent valuation where material.
All transactions exceeding 10% of the company's revenue or net worth should be individually highlighted.
